'''dhatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabooistically|tabooistically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabooistically|tabooistically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhatate|dhatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhatatesher|dhatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatatesherĂ«m|dhatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhatatero|dhatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhatateshĂ«|dhatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatateshĂ«m|dhatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhatatero|gokidhatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhatateshĂ«|gokidhatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatateshĂ«m|gokidhatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhatankerom|godhatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhatankeshĂ«|godhatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhatankeshĂ«m|godhatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhatankeya|godhatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhataterom|dhataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatatemu|dhatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhatateya|dhatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhataterom|gokidhataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatatemu|gokidhatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhatateya|gokidhatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhatatate|dhatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhatatatesher|dhatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatatatesherĂ«m|dhatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhatatatero|dhatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhatatateshĂ«|dhatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatatateshĂ«m|dhatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhatatatero|gokidhatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhatatateshĂ«|gokidhatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatatateshĂ«m|gokidhatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhatatankerom|godhatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhatatankeshĂ«|godhatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhatatankeshĂ«m|godhatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhatatankeya|godhatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhatataterom|dhatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatatatemu|dhatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhatatateya|dhatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhatataterom|gokidhatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatatatemu|gokidhatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhatatateya|gokidhatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠte|dhĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠtesher|dhĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠtero|dhĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠtĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠtĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠtĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠterom|dhĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠtemu|dhĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠteya|dhĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠtĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠtĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhaftafte|dhaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhaftaftesher|dhaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhaftaftesherĂ«m|dhaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhaftaftero|dhaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhaftafteshĂ«|dhaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhaftafteshĂ«m|dhaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhaftaftero|gokidhaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhaftafteshĂ«|gokidhaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhaftafteshĂ«m|gokidhaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhaftafnkerom|godhaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhaftafnkeshĂ«|godhaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhaftafnkeshĂ«m|godhaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhaftafnkeya|godhaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhaftafterom|dhaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhaftaftemu|dhaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhaftafteya|dhaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhaftafterom|gokidhaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhaftaftemu|gokidhaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhaftafteya|gokidhaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
